last_completed_round.direction_name: Restore the round-8 streaming-B branch before continuing exploration
last_completed_round.hypothesis: The current implementation surface is a dead-end final-round producer-only staging experiment. Restoring the round-8 streaming-B branch puts the code back on the last recent branch that improved runtime and feed-side metrics without increasing registers or shared memory. That branch is the right exploratory anchor if the next 29 rounds are meant to compound one family rather than wander across already-falsified ideas.

notes: Completed round 1/30. Continue with node_b for round 2/30. Accepted base: 20260419_215456_bf16_gemm_v1_13caa86 at 30.618112 ms.
